message:
feat(polyfills): add stream state properties and buffer constants

Stream module:
- Add Readable.readable property getter
- Add Writable.writable and writableNeedDrain property getters
- Fix Transform._flush() to be called during end()
- Add Duplex.allowHalfOpen option support
- Enhanced Duplex with proper push/write/end methods

Buffer module:
- Add Buffer.poolSize static property (8192)
- Add Buffer.constants with MAX_LENGTH and MAX_STRING_LENGTH

Events module:
- Add EventEmitter.captureRejections, errorMonitor, defaultMaxListeners
- Add events.getEventListeners() and events.addAbortListener()
